systemStatus.headline: Mon Jul 13 7 AM run. Sunday Jul 12 Toast numbers are IN (group-level): net $6,860.86, -23.5% vs Sun Jul 5. Today's Sling schedule is IN. Google Ads + Yelp scraped LIVE.
systemStatus.detail: Mon Jul 13 7 AM run -- all four sources refreshed. TOAST (Sun Jul 12, group-level email 6:29 AM PT): net $6,860.86 / gross $7,050.86 / 259 guests / 159 orders / avg $43.15 per order, $26.49 per guest / labor 18.6% / discounts 2.7% ($190.00) / 14 void items / 1 order left open / no auto-clockouts. vs SDLW (Sun Jul 5, net $8,973.00): -23.5% -- but Jul 5 was the holiday-weekend Sunday, so treat the gap as a soft comparison, not a collapse. Labor at 18.6% is fine. The LOCATION-level Sun Jul 12 email (checks, avg check, void $, actual labor cost, dayparts, rooms, 4-week avg) lands ~7:39 AM PT, after this run -- those fields are null/derived for now and will fill in on the next run. SLING (Mon Jul 13, delivered 7:00 AM PT): 8 employees, 8 shifts, 31.58 hours, 0 uncovered, 0 overtime, 1 off. GOOGLE ADS (LIVE): Jul 12 cost $66.87 (-$2.12), 7,274 impr (+81), 129 clicks, CTR 1.77%, CPC $0.52, 0 conversions. 7-day (Jul 6-12): $417.34 cost, 59,075 impr, 1,094 clicks, 302.17 conv. STANDING FLAG: PMax-2 is still 'Limited by budget' AND has all asset groups limited by policy -- and BHC Coffee Search has now flipped to 'Limited by budget' too, so BOTH live campaigns are budget-capped. That policy block on PMax-2 remains the single clearest fix. YELP (LIVE): last 30d 29.3k ad impressions, 402 clicks, 530 page visits from ads, 125 leads from ads; billing period Jul 1-12 spend $169.54, CPC $1.00, CPL $2.97 (improved from $3.31). Yelp shows a 'finish ad setup' prompt with 1 item remaining. TRIPADVISOR: no ad report. REVIEWS: no new review emails since the 4 AM run; 4 still unanswered, Patrick Williams 5* now 18 days old (OVERDUE).

toast.source: GROUP-level Daily Performance Summary (All Locations, Sun Jul 12), received Mon Jul 13 6:29 AM PT.
toast.note: SUN JUL 12: Net $6,860.86 / Gross $7,050.86 / 259 guests / 159 orders / labor 18.6% / discounts 2.7% ($190.00) / 14 void items / 1 order left open. vs SDLW (Sun Jul 5, $8,973.00 net): -23.5%. NOTE: this is the GROUP-level email. The LOCATION-level email (checks, avg check, void $ amount, actual labor cost, dayparts, rooms, 4-week avg) usually lands ~7:39 AM PT and was not available at this 7 AM run. Labor cost and discounts here are DERIVED from the percentages; dayparts/rooms/4-week-avg are empty until the location email arrives.

toastPrevDay.source: LOCATION-level Daily Performance Summary (229 West Montecito Street, Sat Jul 11), received Jul 12 7:39 AM PT. Parsed from HTML on the Mon Jul 13 4 AM run. This is the FINAL, complete Sat Jul 11 record.
toastPrevDay.note: SAT JUL 11 FINAL: Net $10,005.52 / Gross $10,229.70 / 403 guests / 235 orders / 261 checks / avg guest $24.83 / avg order $42.58 / avg check $38.34 / discounts $224.18 / voids $223.70 (22 items) / refunds $0 / labor $1,692.17 = 16.9% of net. vs 4-week avg: net +27.0%, labor 16.9% vs 19.6% -- a genuinely strong Saturday on the right cost line. vs SDLW (Sat Jul 4, July 4th holiday, $3,829.55): +161.3% -- ignore, depressed baseline. Lunch outsold Dinner: $5,168.70 vs $4,473.82 net. Back Room had the highest net/order at $82.39.
